headline: Does AI Tool Demand and Bridgewater’s Bet Change The Bull Case For Lam Research (LRCX)?
summary: In recent months, Lam Research has reported strong fiscal Q2 2026 results, expanded collaborations with IBM and CEA-Leti, and continued to benefit from elevated AI-driven demand for its etch and deposition tools across DRAM, HBM, and advanced logic production. A particularly interesting development is billionaire investor Ray Dalio’s Bridgewater Associates more than doubling its Lam Research stake in 2025, underscoring growing institutional attention to the company’s role in AI-centric...

headline: Semiconductors Winners And Losers At The Start Of Q2 2026
summary: Semiconductor stocks surged then slid as Q1 2026 tailwinds turned to headwinds.
